## 🏗️ **Clean Architecture Considerations**

### **Layer Impact:**
- [ ] **Domain Layer**: New business entities/value objects
- [ ] **Application Layer**: New use cases/business logic
- [ ] **Infrastructure Layer**: External services/repositories  
- [ ] **Presentation Layer**: API endpoints/UI components

### **Service Impact:**
- [ ] 🎯 Frontend Service (Port 8080/8081)
- [ ] 🚌 Event Bus Service (Port 8014)
- [ ] 📈 Data Processing Service (Port 8017) 
- [ ] 🤖 ML Analytics Service (Port 8021)
- [ ] 🎯 Prediction Tracking Service (Port 8018)
- [ ] 💰 Unified Profit Engine (Port 8025)
- [ ] Other: _______________

**Must Have:**

## 🧪 **Testing Requirements**

### **Test Coverage:**
- [ ] Unit Tests for business logic
- [ ] Integration Tests for API endpoints
- [ ] Performance Tests (if performance-critical)
- [ ] End-to-End Tests for user workflows

### **Quality Gates:**
- [ ] Code Coverage ≥ 80% for new code
- [ ] Response Time < 0.12s for critical endpoints  
- [ ] Security scan without HIGH/CRITICAL issues
- [ ] Clean Architecture compliance verified

---

## ⚡ **Performance Considerations**

### **Performance Requirements:**
- [ ] Response Time: < _____ seconds
- [ ] Memory Usage: < _____ MB
- [ ] Database Queries: < _____ ms
- [ ] Concurrent Users: _____ users

### **Scalability:**
<!-- How will this feature scale? Any potential bottlenecks? -->

---

## 🔒 **Security Considerations**

### **Security Requirements:**
- [ ] Input validation required
- [ ] Authentication/authorization needed
- [ ] Sensitive data handling
- [ ] External API security
- [ ] Rate limiting considerations

### **Compliance:**
<!-- Any regulatory or compliance requirements? -->

---

## 📊 **Implementation Estimate**

### **Complexity Assessment:**
- [ ] **Simple** (< 1 week): Straightforward implementation
- [ ] **Medium** (1-2 weeks): Some complexity, multiple services
- [ ] **Complex** (2-4 weeks): Significant changes, architectural impact
- [ ] **Epic** (1+ months): Major feature, multiple phases

### **Dependencies:**
- [ ] Requires database schema changes
- [ ] Needs new external service integration
- [ ] Depends on other features/issues: #___
- [ ] Requires infrastructure changes
- [ ] No significant dependencies

---
